app.name: Music to MIDI
app.subtitle: Intelligently convert music to MIDI files

cli.self_test: Check YourMT3+ availability without opening the GUI
cli.self_test_no_load: Check portable resources and the YourMT3+ entrypoint without loading the model
cli.self_test_miros: Check MIROS availability without opening the GUI
cli.miros_worker: Internal MIROS worker mode used by the desktop app

startup.self_test_loading_yourmt3_model: Self-test is loading the YourMT3+ model
startup.detected_4k_passthrough: Detected a 4K display; using PassThrough DPI rounding policy
startup.install_pyqt_hint: Error: PyQt6 is required. Install it with: pip install PyQt6

dropzone.title: Drop audio file here, or click to select
dropzone.subtitle: Supports MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, M4A

mode.label: Processing Mode
mode.smart_tooltip: Convert a full mix to multi-instrument MIDI with YourMT3+, MIROS, or MuScriptor-large
mode.vocal_split_tooltip: Only extract vocals with Leap XE and accompaniment with PolarFormer; then choose a multi-instrument or piano model on each waveform as needed
mode.six_stem_split_tooltip: Only separate bass / drums / guitar / piano / vocals / other WAV files; then choose a model per track as needed
mode.piano_transkun_tooltip: Use the dedicated TransKun piano model for pure piano audio
mode.piano_transkun_v2_aug_tooltip: Transcribe solo piano with the data-augmented TransKun V2 model
mode.piano_aria_amt_tooltip: Use the dedicated Aria-AMT piano model for pure piano audio
mode.piano_bytedance_pedal_tooltip: Use ByteDance's pedal-aware piano model for pure piano audio
mode.smart_hint: Best for full mixes containing multiple instruments. Outputs GM multi-instrument MIDI.
mode.smart_yourmt3_hint: Best for full mixes. Choose the model structure above and output GM multi-instrument MIDI.
mode.smart_miros_hint: Best for full mixes. Uses a MusicFM multi-decoder to identify instruments and output GM MIDI.
mode.smart_muscriptor_hint: Best for full mixes. Leave the instrument list empty for automatic detection; after selecting instruments, output contains only those instruments.
mode.vocal_split_hint: Extract vocals and accompaniment into two WAV tracks. After separation, choose a model and convert each track to MIDI independently.
mode.six_stem_split_hint: Split the audio into bass, drums, guitar, piano, vocals, and other WAV tracks. Then choose a model and convert each track to MIDI independently.
mode.piano_transkun_hint: Best for solo piano. Outputs piano MIDI directly.
mode.piano_transkun_v2_aug_desc: 🎹  TransKun V2 Aug  —  Data-Augmented Piano Transcription
mode.piano_transkun_v2_aug_hint: Best for solo piano. Uses the data-augmented TransKun V2 model.
mode.piano_aria_amt_hint: Best for solo piano. Outputs piano MIDI directly.
mode.piano_bytedance_pedal_hint: Best for solo piano with sustain pedal and preserves CC64 pedal data.

engine.dedicated_mode_hint: This mode uses the selected piano model directly.
engine.manual_split_midi_hint: After separation, choose a model and convert each track to MIDI independently.
engine.yourmt3_tooltip: Multi-instrument transcription backend with several model structures.
engine.yourmt3_midi_tooltip: This is only the post-separation MIDI backend; it does not perform vocal or six-stem audio separation.
engine.yourmt3_general_hint: Convert a full mix directly to GM multi-instrument MIDI; choose the model structure above.
engine.yourmt3_six_stem_hint: Six-stem separation is fixed to BS-RoFormer SW Fixed. The selected YourMT3+ checkpoint independently transcribes the real bass/drums/guitar/piano/vocals/other stems into their MIDI files.
engine.vocal_split_yourmt3_midi_hint: Vocal separation is fixed to Leap XE vocals + PolarFormer accompaniment. The selected YourMT3+ checkpoint only transcribes the two real stems.
engine.miros_tooltip: Multi-instrument transcription backend based on a MusicFM multi-decoder.
engine.miros_general_hint: Convert a full mix directly to GM multi-instrument MIDI.
engine.miros_six_stem_hint: Six-stem separation is fixed to BS-RoFormer SW Fixed. MIROS independently transcribes the real bass/drums/guitar/piano/vocals/other stems into their MIDI files.
engine.vocal_split_miros_midi_hint: Vocal separation is fixed to Leap XE vocals + PolarFormer accompaniment. MIROS only transcribes the two real stems.
engine.muscriptor_tooltip: 1.4B multi-instrument transcription model with automatic detection or instrument-limited output.
engine.muscriptor_general_hint: Leave the instrument list empty for automatic detection; after selecting instruments, output contains only those instruments.
engine.muscriptor_instruments_title: What instruments are there in this track?
engine.muscriptor_instruments_desc: Select one or more distinct instruments. Leave empty for automatic detection; output is limited to the selected instruments.
engine.yourmt3_model_tooltip: Choose the model structure used by YourMT3+.

status.cancelling: Cancelling; waiting for the current inference to stop safely…

about.title: About Music to MIDI
about.description: Convert audio to editable MIDI files
about.author: Author

audio_tracks.title: Multitrack Audio Timeline
audio_tracks.subtitle: View real waveforms, add local audio, and convert tracks independently. The mouse wheel only scrolls the page; it never changes models, zoom, time, or volume.
audio_tracks.remove_tooltip: Remove this track from the timeline
audio_tracks.closed: The audio track player is closed
audio_tracks.empty: There are no audio tracks to play
audio_tracks.empty_timeline: There are no tracks on the timeline
audio_tracks.missing_file: Audio track file does not exist: {path}
audio_tracks.no_output_device: No audio output device is available
audio_tracks.invalid_media: The media file is invalid or cannot be decoded
audio_tracks.load_timeout: These tracks took longer than 10 seconds to load: {tracks}
audio_tracks.unavailable: The audio track player could not be created: {error}
audio_tracks.separation_manual_hint: No MIDI was generated automatically. Enable MIDI on a target track, choose a model, then click “Start conversion”; only that track is converted.

export.save_all_title: Choose a Folder for All Tracks
export.extension_mismatch: The saved file must use the {extension} extension
export.overwrite_message:
These files already exist. Overwrite them?
{files}
export.busy: An audio track save is already running

manual_midi.model_required: MIDI: enabled; choose a transcription model
manual_midi.selected: MIDI: {model} selected; click “Start conversion” to convert only this track
manual_midi.busy: Another transcription task is running. Wait for it to finish or stop it first.

app.title: Music to MIDI
app.subtitle: Intelligently convert music to editable MIDI files

ui.audio_input: Drop audio file here, or click to select
ui.audio_hint: Supports MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, M4A (automatically converted to WAV for processing)
ui.vocal_split_merge_midi: Output 1 merged vocal+accompaniment MIDI (vocal split mode)
ui.zerogpu_note: (ZeroGPU short clips only; sign-in is currently required: free accounts get 5 GPU minutes/day, while the anonymous 2-minute quota is below the conservative minimum request; requests beyond one platform-adjusted window are rejected before processing)
ui.download_label: Click to download after conversion finishes

mode.smart_info: **Multi-Instrument MIDI** — Convert a full mix directly to multi-instrument MIDI with YourMT3+, MIROS, or MuScriptor-large.
mode.vocal_split_info: **Vocal/Accompaniment Split** — Extract vocals and accompaniment into two WAV tracks. After separation, choose a model and convert each track to MIDI independently.
mode.six_stem_split_info: **Six-Stem Split** — Generate bass, drums, guitar, piano, vocals, and other WAV tracks. Then choose a model and convert each track to MIDI independently.
mode.piano_transkun_info: **TransKun (Piano)** — Dedicated transcription model for solo piano audio, directly outputs piano MIDI.
mode.piano_transkun_v2_aug_info: **TransKun V2 Aug (Piano)** — Uses the data-augmented TransKun V2 model and outputs piano MIDI directly.
mode.piano_aria_amt_info: **Aria-AMT (Piano)** — Best for solo piano and outputs piano MIDI directly.
mode.piano_bytedance_pedal_info: **ByteDance Pedal (Piano)** — Pedal-aware transcription for solo piano audio. Preserves sustain pedal CC64.

error.upload_required: Please upload an audio file first
error.zerogpu_clip_too_long: This audio is estimated to require {estimate:.0f} GPU seconds, above the {limit}-second limit for one logged-in free-account job. Shorten the audio or use Colab, the desktop build, or a dedicated GPU.

status.output_retention: Downloads enter expiration cleanup after {hours:g} hours; failed jobs are removed immediately and this instance's results are removed on normal process exit.

progress.yourmt3_oom_retry_applied: OOM retry applied: initial batch={initial_batch}, final batch={final_batch}
progress.yourmt3_vram_retry: VRAM is insufficient: initial batch={initial_batch}, lowered to batch={final_batch} and retrying
progress.running_miros_elapsed: Running MIROS inference... elapsed {seconds}s, waiting for {output}
progress.loading_vocal_separator: Preparing vocal/accompaniment separation: Leap XE first, then PolarFormer...
progress.separation_model_switching: {from_model} ({from_role}) complete; saving WAV and switching to the {to_model} ({to_role}) model: {model_file}...
progress.audio_chunk_running: Running inference: {model} ({role}) audio chunk {current}/{total}; model {model_file}; {engine}; ~{chunk_seconds}s/chunk with ~{overlap_seconds}s adjacent overlap; not workflow stages or retries
progress.audio_chunk_progress: Audio chunk progress: {model} {role} {done}/{total} (~{chunk_seconds}s/chunk, ~{overlap_seconds}s adjacent overlap; not workflow stages or retries)
progress.cpu_retry: Detected an unsupported NVIDIA GPU architecture, retrying on CPU...

muscriptor_result.streaming: MuScriptor is streaming notes into the piano roll…
muscriptor_result.progress_waiting: Waiting for the first transcription chunk…
muscriptor_result.preview_waiting: Playback starts after the first chunk containing notes
muscriptor_result.preview_rendering: Rendering playable SoundFont audio for chunk {completed}/{total}…
muscriptor_result.preview_ready: Playable through {time}; transcription is still running
muscriptor_result.preview_buffered: The next MIDI segment is ready; pause to extend playback through {time}
muscriptor_result.preview_complete: The currently playable segment ended at {time}; transcription is still running
muscriptor_result.preview_failed: Streaming playback rendering failed and no more preview snapshots will be generated: {error}
muscriptor_result.preparing_audio: Transcription complete; preparing playback audio and export files…
muscriptor_result.final_audio_preparing: Rendering complete SoundFont playback and export files…
muscriptor_result.final_audio_ready: Complete playback audio and export files are ready
muscriptor_result.final_audio_buffered: Complete MIDI audio is ready; pause to switch to the final result
muscriptor_result.final_audio_failed_preview: Complete playback audio is unavailable; the existing preview remains playable
muscriptor_result.final_audio_failed_unavailable: Complete playback audio was not generated, so no audio is currently playable
muscriptor_result.ready: Piano roll and SoundFont playback are ready
muscriptor_result.audio_failed: MIDI was generated, but playback audio or export preparation failed: {error}
muscriptor_result.mute: Mute on the MIDI synthesis bus
muscriptor_result.zoom_help: Ctrl/Alt + wheel to zoom; Shift + wheel to scroll horizontally

transcription_result.cancelled: Transcription was cancelled; incomplete chunks were not published as MIDI
